findings.title: Custom slab allocator identified but metadata layout unrecoverable
findings.statement: Network message handler routes through a custom slab allocator. Static analysis via objdump and readelf confirms non-standard allocation paths, but the allocator metadata layout, free-list structure, and slab sizing cannot be recovered without heap dump inspection or dynamic memory analysis.

evidence.summary: objdump and readelf identify custom allocator entry points but cannot resolve metadata layout
